Class ThemeColors

java.lang.Object
View.ThemeColors
public class ThemeColors extends Object
Colour palette used by the interface. Two ready-made themes are provided (light and dark); of(boolean) returns the right one for the current dark-mode flag.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static ThemeColors of(boolean darkMode)
      Returns the palette for the requested theme.
      Parameters:
      darkMode - true for the dark theme
      Returns:
      the matching palette

    • styleButton

      public void styleButton(AbstractButton b, boolean selected)
      Applies the current theme to a button (or toggle), forcing it to be fully painted with the theme colour even under the default (Metal) Look and Feel. This is what prevents the "white bands" that used to appear on buttons in dark mode. When selected is true, the accent background is used instead.
      Parameters:
      b - the button to style
      selected - whether the button is in its selected/active state
